definition: very famous and respected

sentence.en: The university is renowned for its cutting-edge research facilities, attracting top scholars from all over the globe.
sentence.uz: Universitet o'zining ilg'or tadqiqot muassasalari bilan mashhur bo'lib, butun dunyodan eng yaxshi olimlarni o'ziga jalb qiladi.

definition: to change or improve something

sentence.en: The committee voted unanimously to amend the constitution in order to protect the fundamental rights of minorities.
sentence.uz: Qo'mita ozchiliklarning huquqlarini himoya qilish maqsadida konstitutsiyaga o'zgartirish kiritish uchun bir ovozdan ovoz berdi.

definition: to leave or pull out of something

sentence.en: Due to unexpected financial constraints, the tech giant decided to withdraw its sponsorship from the international chess matchup.
sentence.uz: Kutilmagan moliyaviy qiyinchiliklar tufayli texnologiya giganti xalqaro shaxmat musobaqasidan o'z homiyligini qaytarib olishga qaror qildi.

definition: highly respected and admired

sentence.en: Winning a scholarship to such a prestigious academy is an accomplishment that will open endless doors for his professional career.
sentence.uz: Bunday nufuzli akademiyaga stipendiya yutib olish — uning professional karyerasi uchun cheksiz eshiklarni ochadigan muvaffaqiyatdir.

definition: a change made to something

sentence.en: The source code required a significant alteration because the legacy database schema could not synchronize with the new API microservice.
sentence.uz: Eski ma'lumotlar bazasi sxemasi yangi API mikroxizmati bilan sinxronlasha olmagani sababli, dastur kodiga jiddiy o'zgartirish kiritish talab qilindi.

definition: leaving a job or position officially

sentence.en: The unexpected resignation of the chief researcher left the entire development team in a state of temporary confusion.
sentence.uz: Bosh tadqiqotchining kutilmagan iste'fosi butun ishlab chiquvchilar jamoasini vaqtinchalik chalkashlik holatida qoldirdi.

definition: being honest and having strong moral principles

sentence.en: A true professional never compromises their integrity, even when facing immense pressure from corporate executives.
sentence.uz: Haqiqiy professional, hatto korporativ rahbarlar tomonidan kuchli bosimga duch kelganda ham, o'z halolligi va prinsiplaridan voz kechmaydi.

definition: well-known and important

sentence.en: He played a prominent role in designing the clean architecture structure of the company’s cloud-based enterprise solution.
sentence.uz: U kompaniyaning bulutli korporativ yechimining toza arxitektura strukturasini loyihalashda muhim va ko'zga ko'ringan rol o'ynadi.

definition: to grow crops or develop something

sentence.en: The intensive training program is deliberately designed to cultivate high-performance teamwork and innovative thinking among junior software developers.
sentence.uz: Intensiv o'quv dasturi kichik dasturchilar o'rtasida yuqori samarali jamoaviy ish va innovatsion fikrlashni shakllantirish (o'stirish) uchun ataylab ishlab chiqilgan.

definition: a basic and essential product or food

sentence.en: While rice remains a staple commodity in Asian cuisine, high-quality data has rapidly become the staple resource for AI-driven ecosystems.
sentence.uz: Guruch Osiyo oshxonasida asosiy mahsulot bo'lib qolayotgan bo'lsa-da, yuqori sifatli ma'lumotlar sun'iy intellektga asoslangan ekotizimlar uchun tezda asosiy manbaga aylandi.

definition: the way someone earns money to live

sentence.en: Thousands of local farmers depend completely on stable weather conditions for their yearly crop yields and basic livelihood.
sentence.uz: Minglab mahalliy dehqonlar o'zlarining yillik hosildorligi va asosiy tirikchiliklari uchun butunlay barqaror ob-havo sharoitlariga tayanadilar.

definition: a replacement for something else

sentence.en: Artificial intelligence can enhance productivity, but it can never serve as a complete substitute for human empathy and critical creativity.
sentence.uz: Sun'iy intellekt samaradorlikni oshirishi mumkin, biroq u hech qachon insoniy empatiya va tanqidiy ijodkorlikning to'liq o'rinbosari bo'la olmaydi.

definition: good value, not wasteful

sentence.en: Deploying serverless functions proved to be a highly economical approach for handling unpredictable traffic spikes in our SaaS framework.
sentence.uz: Serverless funksiyalarni joriy qilish bizning SaaS tizimimizdagi kutilmagan trafik o'sishlarini boshqarish uchun juda tejamkor yondashuv ekanligini isbotladi.

definition: too much, more than necessary

sentence.en: The automation test script failed because the backend handler spent excessive time resolving the nested database queries.
sentence.uz: Avtomatlashtirilgan test skripti muvaffaqiyatsiz tugadi, chunki backend ishlovchisi ichma-ich joylashgan ma'lumotlar bazasi so'rovlarini bajarishga haddan tashqari ko'p vaqt sarfladi.

definition: to send something to a destination

sentence.en: The central warehouse is fully optimized to automatically process and dispatch client inventories within mere minutes of verification.
sentence.uz: Markaziy ombor mijozlar zaxiralarini tekshiruvdan o'tganidan so'ng bir necha daqiqa ichida avtomatik ravishda qayta ishlash va jo'natish uchun to'liq optimallashtirilgan.

definition: easily broken or damaged

sentence.en: Because the old monolithic system had a fragile deployment flow, even minor logic fixes frequently crashed the core product.
sentence.uz: Eski monolit tizim mo'rt (oson shikastlanuvchi) joylashtirish oqimiga ega bo'lganligi sababli, hatto kichik mantiqiy tuzatishlar ham asosiy mahsulotni tez-tez ishdan chiqarar edi.

definition: enough for what is needed

sentence.en: Before launching our application globally on production servers, we must ensure we have adequate cloud storage and bandwith capacity.
sentence.uz: Ilovamizni ishlab chiqarish serverlarida global miqyosda ishga tushirishdan oldin, bizda yetarli bulutli xotira va tarmoq o'tkazuvchanligi mavjudligiga ishonch hosil qilishimiz kerak.

contamination: the presence of harmful or unwanted substances

sentence.en: The environmental research revealed severe chemical contamination in the local river, threatening the surrounding agricultural yields.
sentence.uz: Atrof-muhitni o'rganish tadqiqoti mahalliy daryoda og'ir kimyoviy ifloslanishni aniqladi, bu esa atrofdagi qishloq xo'jaligi hosildorligiga tahdid solmoqda.

definition: hard but easily snapped or broken

sentence.en: As certain plastics age under heavy exposure to sunlight, they become increasingly brittle and prone to fracturing under minimal pressure.
sentence.uz: Ayrim plastmassa turlari quyosh nuri ostida qarigan sari, ular borgan sari mo'rt bo'lib qoladi va minimal bosim ostida ham sinishga moyil bo'ladi.

definition: to rise very quickly

sentence.en: Shares of the technology company are projected to soar once their breakthrough automated testing model is introduced at the annual convention.
sentence.uz: Texnologiya kompaniyasining aksiyalari yillik anjumanda o'zlarining inqilobiy avtomatlashtirilgan test modeli taqdim etilgandan so'ng, keskin ko'tarilishi (oshishi) rejalashtirilmoqda.

definition: the amount produced from crops or effort

sentence.en: Implementing clean code paradigms might require more initial planning, but it will ultimately yield a far more stable and scalable product.
sentence.uz: Toza kod paradigmalarini joriy etish dastlab ko'proq rejalashtirishni talab qilishi mumkin, ammo yakuniy natijada u ancha barqaror va kengayuvchan mahsulot (hosil/natija) beradi.

definition: to feel very worried or afraid about something that is going to happen.

sentence.en: Many students genuinely dread the rigorous final examination, spending endless nights reviewing complex analytical frameworks.
sentence.uz: Ko'pgina talabalar qat'iy yakuniy imtihondan chin dildan qo'rqishadi (xavotirga tushishadi) va murakkab tahliliy tuzilmalarni ko'rib chiqish uchun cheksiz tunlarni sarflashadi.

definition: a strong belief or opinion that someone is certain is true.

sentence.en: She argued with absolute conviction that implementing high-performance microservices was the only viable strategy for their tech startup.
sentence.uz: U o'zlarining texnologik startaplari uchun yuqori samarali mikroxizmatlarni joriy etish yagona hayotiy strategiya ekanligini mutloq ishonch (hukm/qat'iyat) bilan ta'kidladi.

definition: to strongly encourage someone to do something

sentence.en: Experienced senior developers constantly urge newcomers to master fundamental concurrency patterns before jumping into advanced software frameworks.
sentence.uz: Tajribali katta dasturchilar yangi kelganlarni murakkab dasturiy freymvorklarga sho'ng'ishdan oldin fundamental parallel bajarilish (concurrency) modellarini o'zlashtirishga astoydil undaydilar (talab qiladilar).

definition: to officially say what should be done; to recommend something as a treatment or solution

sentence.en: While medical professionals prescribe specific drugs for physical ailments, system engineers prescribe architectural standards to fix bottlenecks.
sentence.uz: Tibbiyot xodimlari jismoniy kasalliklar uchun maxsus dori-darmonlarni tavsiya qilsalar (retsept yozsalar), tizim muhandislari tiqilinchlarni (bottlenecks) bartaraf etish uchun arxitektura standartlarini belgilaydilar.

definition: not having enough sleep

sentence.en: Working students frequently find themselves sleep-deprived as they struggle to balance professional responsibilities with intensive academic goals.
sentence.uz: Ishlaydigan talabalar professional majburiyatlarni intensiv akademik maqsadlar bilan muvozanatlashga harakat qilar ekanlar, ko'pincha o'zlarini uyqusiz holatda ko'radilar.

definition: to announce something publicly or strongly

sentence.en: The government intends to proclaim a new digital infrastructure policy that directly supports local open-source technology initiatives.
sentence.uz: Hukumat mahalliy ochiq kodli texnologiya tashabbuslarini to'g'ridan-to'g'ri qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan yangi raqamli infratuzilma siyosatini e'lon qilishni (jar solishni) niyat qilmoqda.

options: [yo'lovchilar va ekipaj] har ikkalasi uchun birdek foydali

definition: to draw attention to something or explain something important

sentence.en: During the rigorous code review, the team leader took time to point out several critical concurrency issues within the background tasks.
sentence.uz: Kodni qat'iy ko'rib chiqish (code review) davomida jamoa yetakchisi fondagi vazifalar ichidagi bir nechta muhim parallel bajarilish xatolariga e'tibor qaratishga (bildirib o'tishga) vaqt ajratdi.

definition: likely to be affected by something, especially something negative

sentence.en: Without a robust Web Application Firewall, the entire software cloud network remains highly susceptible to malicious cyber attacks.
sentence.uz: Mustahkam Veb Ilovalar Devori (WAF) bo'lmasa, butun dasturiy bulut tarmog'i zararli kiberhujumlarga juda nozik (zaif) bo'lib qoladi.

definition: involving little physical activity

sentence.en: Leading a sedentary lifestyle behind an office desk for years can significantly elevate long-term health risks.
sentence.uz: Yillar davomida ofis stoli ortida harakatsiz turmush tarzini olib borish uzoq muddatli sog'liq uchun xavflarni sezilarli darajada oshirishi mumkin.

definition: in a sufficient or satisfactory way

sentence.en: We cannot deploy the SaaS application until the deployment pipeline is adequately secured and error logs are fully monitored.
sentence.uz: Joylashtirish oqimi (pipeline) yetarlicha xavfsiz holatga keltirilmaguncha va xatoliklar jurnali to'liq nazorat qilinmaguncha, biz SaaS ilovasini ishga tushira olmaymiz.

definition: to remember or consider something important

sentence.en: When designing a multi-tenant application database, you must bear in mind the qat'iy isolation and privacy configurations of each user.
sentence.uz: Ko'p ijarachili (multi-tenant) ilova ma'lumotlar bazasini loyihalashda siz har bir foydalanuvchining qat'iy ajratilganligi va maxfiylik sozlamalarini yodda tutishingiz kerak.

definition: related to thinking, learning, and understanding

sentence.en: Studies demonstrate that continuous intensive technical deep-dives significantly stimulate and strengthen advanced cognitive patterns.
sentence.uz: Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, doimiy intensiv texnik izlanishlar ilg'or fikrlash va o'rganishga moillik (kognitiv) modellarini sezilarli darajada rag'batlantiradi va mustahkamlaydi.

definition: after a long time or after many changes

sentence.en: Although the debugging process took several exhausting hours, the software architecture team eventually stabilized the microservices network.
sentence.uz: Garchi xatoliklarni tuzatish jarayoni bir necha charchatadigan soatlarni olgan bo'lsa-da, dasturiy ta'minot arxitekturasi jamoasi oxir-oqibat mikroxizmatlar tarmog'ini barqarorlashtirdi.

options: [yo'lovchilar va ekipaj] har ikkalasi uchun birdek foydali

definition: causing a feeling of self-consciousness, shame, or awkwardness

sentence.en: It can feel highly embarrassing to experience a complete application crash during a live production demonstration for corporate clients.
sentence.uz: Korporativ mijozlar uchun jonli namoyish paytida ilovaning to'liq ishdan chiqishiga duch kelish juda sharmandali tuyulishi mumkin.

definition: the damaging lack of material benefits considered to be basic necessities

sentence.en: Severe sleep deprivation negatively impairs an engineer's performance, leading to structural logical oversights during complex systems integration.
sentence.uz: Og'ir uyqu yetishmasligi (mahrumlik) muhandisning ish faoliyatiga salbiy ta'sir ko'rsatadi, bu esa murakkab tizimlarni integratsiya qilish paytida tarkibiy mantiqiy xatoliklarga olib keladi.

definition: clearly defined or identified; used to give more precise details

sentence.en: To be specific, the system requirements dictate that our inventory database must handle data synchronization even when completely offline.
sentence.uz: Ochig'ini aytganda (aniqroq qilib aytganda), tizim talablari bizning inventarizatsiya ma'lumotlar bazamiz butunlay oflayn rejimda bo'lganda ham ma'lumotlarni sinxronlashtirishni amalga oshirishi shartligini belgilaydi.

definition: speaking publicly to an audience to share information, ideas, or experiences

sentence.en: Giving a talk on clean backend principles at an international conference is an exceptional way to build a professional reputation.
sentence.uz: Xalqaro konferensiyada toza backend prinsiplari haqida ma'ruza qilish (nutq so'zlash) — professional obro'ni shakllantirishning ajoyib usulidir.

definition: he will discover his true identity, passions, or purpose in life

sentence.en: If he continues to push boundaries in system design, he will find himself leading elite international tech teams in the near future.
sentence.uz: Agar u tizim dizaynida chegaralarni kengaytirishda davom etsa, yaqin kelajakda u o'zini elita xalqaro texnologik jamoalarni boshqarayotgan holatda ko'radi.

options: [yo'lovchilar va ekipaj] har ikkalasi uchun birdek foydali

definition: equally helpful/useful for both parties specified

sentence.en: The clean documentation was deliberately curated for the benefit of junior developers and structural auditors alike.
sentence.uz: Toza hujjatlashtirish (documentation) kichik dasturchilar va tizim auditorlari — har ikkalasi uchun birdek foydali bo'lishi maqsadida ataylab tayyorlangan.

options: [yo'lovchilar va ekipaj] har ikkalasi uchun birdek foydali

definition: to become unclear, distinct, or less visible

sentence.en: When hours of intense code writing accumulate without breaks, the lines on the monitor begin to blur into a single chaotic block.
sentence.uz: Tanaffuslarsiz soatlab intensiv kod yozish to'planib qolganda, monitordagi qatorlar bitta tartibsiz blok bo'lib hiralashishni boshlaydi.
